executable_code.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

# Read the CSV file
df = pd.read_csv('input_file_0.csv')

# Define a helper function to clean and convert to numeric
def clean_numeric(series):
    # Convert to string to handle any potential mixed types
    series = series.astype(str)
    # Remove dots (thousands separators)
    series = series.str.replace('.', '', regex=False)
    # Replace commas with dots (decimal separators)
    series = series.str.replace(',', '.', regex=False)
    # Convert to numeric
    return pd.to_numeric(series, errors='coerce')

# Apply cleaning to relevant columns
df['Profits After Tax'] = clean_numeric(df['Profits After Tax'])
df['Number of Employees'] = clean_numeric(df['Number of Employees'])

# Calculate means
avg_profit = df['Profits After Tax'].mean()
avg_employees = df['Number of Employees'].mean()

# Output the result as a JSON array of arrays
result = [[round(float(avg_profit), 2), round(float(avg_employees), 2)]]
print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
